meanings.definition: remove all the trees at one time
clearly or sharply defined to the mind
examples: Claudius was the first to invade Britain with distinct...intentions of conquest
trenchant distinctions between right and wrong

meanings.definition: having had all the trees removed at one time
examples: clear-cut hillsides are subject to erosion

meanings.definition: clear and distinct to the senses; easily perceptible
examples: the letter brought back a clear image of his grandfather
a spire clean-cut against the sky
